programs.title: Lakshmanrekha
programs.desc: Amar aspires to join the police force. On the other hand, Vicky enters the world of crime. But a sudden change of events has an ever-lasting impact on their lives.

programs.title: Dhamaal
programs.desc: Four slack and vagabond conmen learn about a hidden treasure from a dying thief and race against time to claim it. Meanwhile, they are also being pursued by a determined police inspector who is hell-bent on finding the treasure and keeping it all to himself.
